prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock C30SEJ (3.6L 24V I6) with a fully built C30SEJ featuring forged internals (Mahle Motorsport forged pistons, Pauter billet crankshaft, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods), ported and polished cylinder head with oversized Ferrea intake/exhaust valves, and a custom camshaft profile from Schrick (272° intake, 280° exhaust, 11.5mm lift) for optimized high-RPM power delivery.

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GTX4202R turbochargers (88mm compressor wheels, .82 A/R turbine housings) with a custom equal-length stainless steel exhaust manifold (fabricated by Bell Intercooler), paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate setup and a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR Racing, 1200hp capable core) with a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump for consistent IAT control.

Drivetrain & Handling: Full transmission rebuild with a ZF 6HP26 6-speed automatic transmission (upgraded with a Sonnax valve body, Precision Industries billet torque converter with 3800 RPM stall, and a Quaife ATB differential), paired with a custom driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly, balanced for 1000+ hp). Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (3-way adjustable, 800lb/in springs), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (full chassis refresh), and a custom front strut tower brace from Cusco (2.5mm thick chromoly steel).
estetica: Aero: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Lotus Carlton-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser), paired with a custom front splitter from APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece adjustable) and a GT wing from Voltex (Type-7, 1800mm width, 3D carbon fiber construction, 30mm risers).

Wheels & Stance: Custom 19x10.5 ET15 (front) and 19x12 ET5 (rear) forged wheels from Work Meister S1 3P (10-spoke, 3-piece construction, 5x120 PCD, polished lip with matte black centers), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear). Aggressive fender roll and pull with custom inner fender liners (polycarbonate, vented for brake cooling).

Exterior & Lighting: Full respray in Lotus Motorsport Racing Green (PPG DBC9900, matte finish) with custom gold pinstriping (hand-painted by HRE Wheels' in-house artist). Retrofit with Hella Rallye 3000 headlights (HID projectors, custom LED DRLs) and a full LED taillight conversion (Lotus Elise S2-style, sequential turn signals). Carbon fiber hood from Seibon (OEM-style latches, vented for intercooler piping) and custom side skirts from Varis (carbon fiber, integrated LED accent lighting).
